---
title: "Spatial variation in complex ecological networks"
image: "../images/card_pics/hawaii.jpg"
description: "We use interaction networks to explore how species relationships change across space. By quantifying variation in network structure, we reveal how local conditions shape ecological connectivity."
categories: ["Hawaii VINE Project"]
contributors: "Corey Tarwater, Jinelle Sperry, Jeferson Vizentin-Bugoni, Jeff Foster, Don Drake"
feature_order: "NA"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
